name: FormattedDate
visual_summary: A FormattedDate component displays a date in a formatted way, useful when you need to show a date to the user without requiring them to read the full date object.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: FormattedDate
Description: A FormattedDate component displays a date in a formatted way, useful when you need to show a date to the user without requiring them to read the full date object.
Style: plain, default
Interactions: 
Tags: date, time, formatted

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// src/components/FormattedDate.astro
---
interface Props {
  date: Date
  class?: string
}

const { date, class: className = '' } = Astro.props
---

<time datetime={date.toISOString()} class={className}>
  {
    date.toLocaleDateString('en-us', {
      day: 'numeric',
      month: 'short',
      year: 'numeric',
    })
  }
</time>
